# action-bar

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Shared cross-app action set. Defines the ActionBar.Item slot; the agent-manager toolbar and the floating bar both render it.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Shell.Toolbar` → `ActionBarStrip`
  - Uses: `shell.Shell`
  - Exports: Values: `ActionBar`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
